prompts.vision_prompt: Describe the user's activity in this image. Focus on the content and what they are doing. Do NOT use the words 'screenshot', 'screen', or 'image'.
prompts.fallback_personality_prompt: Based on this screen description: "%s" Give a SHORT comment (maximum 15 words).
prompts.multimodal_prompt: The attached screenshot shows a user activity, based on this and the later on personality quote give a response to the user.
prompts.tasks: You may receive one or more tasks. Return ONLY the final bracketed command sections requested by those tasks. Start the first character of your response with '['. For each task, output exactly one bracketed section using that task's required prefix and payload. Do not explain, reason, draft, list checks, restate the tasks, or copy placeholder formats.
